form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign won by 0.5 len Seymour Bm70 Hcp October 12 over 1400m defeating Kengero with 59.5kg at $3.80. When resuming last campaign second of 10 at Sandown-Hillside Mares Bm70 September 3 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Sun Setting with 61.5kg at $3.40. This is an ideal race to kick off. Classy mare who can measure up to this fresh.
